author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Two surfaces drop --force: (1) crosslink/resources/container/entrypoint.sh:131 — container's init call inside the agent's container; (2) crosslink/src/commands/kickoff/launch.rs:439 — host-side init_worktree_agent that runs against a freshly-created worktree before the container starts. Both were the same bug pattern and the issue's symptom requires BOTH to be fixed (host runs first, then container runs again — either one re-templates). Plain 'crosslink init' short-circuits at mod.rs:751 when .crosslink/ and .claude/ both exist (the common case for any worktree checked out from a branch that committed them), so the init becomes a no-op. Kept --skip-signing and --defaults on the host call to suppress the TUI walkthrough on the rare path where init actually has work to do. cargo fmt clean, clippy clean, kickoff tests 149/149 pass.
